productDisplayName: Swiss Army Men Classic Perfume & Deodorant Set
description: Style Note For those who like a subtle, beautiful scent, this offering from swiss army is worth a revisit. There are light and dark elements to make it suitable for the day and night, and a cozy, gentle beauty. It has strength, but subtlety. This is more an "aura" fragrance, not one that hits you in the face.Product Details Perfume and Deodorant set, a very well-balanced scent, slightly fresh, green, spicy and woodsyPerfume: 100 ml Deodorant: 75 ml
